title: chamomilla lasiocarpa
intro: Chamomilla lasiocarpa, also known as Long-hairy Chamomile, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of North America. It is a member of the Asteraceae family and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Chamomilla lasiocarpa include soothing digestive issues, reducing anxiety and insomnia, and providing relief from menstrual cramps and other menstrual-related symptoms. Chamomilla lasiocarpa can be used to prepare teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
